# Balaji Koneti - Machine Learning Engineer

> Machine Learning Engineer (GenAI/RAG) with 6+ years in software engineering,
> shipping production retrieval and evaluation systems on AWS.

## Identity

- Full Name: Balaji Koneti
- Title: Machine Learning Engineer (GenAI/RAG)
- Location: Plano, TX, USA
- Website: https://balajikoneti.dev
- Email: balaji.koneti08@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/BalajiKoneti
- GitHub: https://github.com/KonetiBalaji
- Credly: https://www.credly.com/users/balaji-koneti/

## Professional Summary

Balaji Koneti is a Machine Learning Engineer specializing in Generative AI and
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) with 6+ years of software engineering
experience. He currently works at Progress Solutions in Plano, TX, where he
designs and ships production RAG services on AWS.

Key measurable achievements:
- +22% retrieval relevance (Precision@5) on ~450 real enterprise queries
- P95 end-to-end latency reduced from 1.3s to 640ms
- -31% LLM cost per request through token budgets and dynamic model routing
- Built evaluation pipeline combining human review (Label Studio) with LLM-as-judge (RAGAS)

## Technical Skills

### Core Expertise
- GenAI/RAG: LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Chunking, pgvector, Hybrid Retrieval, Vector Search
- LLMs: OpenAI GPT-4/4o, Anthropic Claude, Prompt Engineering, Token Optimization, Dynamic Model Routing
- ML: NLP, Supervised Learning, XGBoost, scikit-learn, PyTorch, BERT, Transformers
- Evaluation: RAGAS, LLM-as-Judge, Human-in-the-Loop (Label Studio), MLflow, SHAP, LIME

### Infrastructure & Engineering
- Languages: Python, Java, SQL
- APIs: FastAPI, REST APIs, Circuit Breakers, Redis Caching
- Cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, SageMaker), Docker, Terraform, CI/CD
- Data: PostgreSQL, ETL Pipelines, SQL Tuning, Indexing & Partitioning

## Work Experience

### Machine Learning Engineer - Progress Solutions (Jun 2025 - Present)
- Led design and rollout of production RAG services using LangChain & pgvector
- Improved retrieval relevance by 22% (P@5) via semantic/recursive chunking and hybrid retrieval
- Cut P95 latency from 1.3s to 640ms via service separation, Redis caching, and embedding batching
- Reduced LLM spend by 31% through token budgets, prompt compression, and dynamic routing
- Built evaluation pipeline with Label Studio + RAGAS + custom GPT graders as release gate
- Productionized inference service with FastAPI on AWS with circuit breakers and abstain handling

### Graduate Teaching Assistant - Northern Arizona University (Jun 2024 - May 2025)
- Led model explainability reviews using SHAP & LIME across 12 projects, 45 students, 30+ models
- Built reusable interpretability notebooks reducing time-to-diagnose by 40%
- Coached teams on evaluation hygiene and reduced rework cycles by 2 iterations

### Software Engineer (ML Systems) - Infosys Ltd (Mar 2022 - Dec 2023)
- Built fraud-detection pipelines over 1M+ transactional records with XGBoost
- Improved ETL performance 43% through SQL tuning and automated data-quality validation
- Integrated ML outputs into backend services with resilient API patterns

### Software Engineer - Nerds and Geeks Pvt Ltd (Dec 2019 - Feb 2022)
- Cut P95 query latency from 450ms to 120ms through schema and SQL optimization
- Automated reporting workflows from 4 hours to 20 minutes
- Reduced production defects by 20% through validation and structured logging

## Education

- M.S. in Computer Science - Northern Arizona University, Flagstaff, AZ (Jan 2024 - May 2025)
  - Focus: AI/ML, Model Explainability, NLP/LLM Systems
  - Graduate TA for Machine Learning
- B.Tech in Computer Science - JNTU, Tirupati, India (Jun 2016 - Nov 2020)

## Certifications

- AWS Certified Machine Learning - Specialty (May 2025)
- IBM Machine Learning Specialist - Advanced (Apr 2025)
- Deep Learning using TensorFlow - IBM (Apr 2025)

## Featured Projects

### Intelligent Learning Assistant
NLP-based learning assistant using BERT + Transformers to guide 200+ students
through stepwise learning workflows. +35% task accuracy, -30% prompt injection
attempts, +40% learning outcome improvement.
Tech: Python, Hugging Face, BERT, PyTorch, FastAPI, Transformers

### LLM for Security Log Detection
Hybrid LLM + BERT + regex pipeline for security log analysis detecting anomalies
and threats. Generates structured triage with severity, cause, and recommended
actions. Web + CLI interfaces for investigation.
Tech: Python, LLM APIs, BERT, Transformers, Regex, FastAPI, Streamlit
